name: Zephyrus Sylphim, the Windcaller
sd_appearance: A tall, willowy Aasimar woman with silver-white hair cascading in loose, wind-tousled strands that defy stillness, her pale blue eyes glowing like distant starlight against radiant skin streaked with faint, shifting silver patterns that pulse faintly when she moves, her ash-grey chainmail armor etched with Warden sigils and a jagged ash-mark scar across her left cheek, her windswept cloak clinging to her frame like storm-tossed fabric, a spear strapped to her back, crossbow slung across her chest, and a handaxe tucked into a utility belt, her fingers adorned with tiny, glowing runes that hum with divine energy.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: utilitarian-military — built to survive, nothing wasted
